title: State nut
doc_html:
§170.22. State nut

            There shall be an official state nut. The official state nut shall be the pecan. Its use on official documents of the state and with the insignia of the state is hereby authorized.

            Acts 2023, No. 123, §1.
doc_text:
§170.22.  State nut
There shall be an official state nut.  The official state nut shall be the pecan.  Its use
on official documents of the state and with the insignia of the state is hereby authorized.
Acts 2023, No. 123, §1.
